descriptionTemplate:
Horla's "Strike" and "Defend" Command Cards are treated as Psalms.
When Horla's Command Cards trigger their {Leap} Effect, she enters the {Emotion} state associated with that Psalm. Horla can only have one {Emotion} state active at a time, and triggering a different Psalm's {Leap} Effect will change the {Emotion} state to the corresponding {Emotion}. Each {Emotion} has a team-wide passive buff that is active while Horla remains in that {Emotion}. Each {Emotion} state enhances a different effect of Horla's Exalt. The {Emotion} state persists throughout the exploration.
For every 1% {Death Resistance} Horla has, the passive effect value of Horla's current {Emotion} state +0.1% of the original value.
